seo.meta_title: Mount Rinjani 4-Day Senaru Trek — Summit, Lake & Hot Spring | Go2Rinjani
seo.meta_description: The ultimate Senaru Rinjani experience — 4 days through rainforest to Pelawangan Senaru, summit at 3,726 m, Segara Anak lake camping & volcanic hot springs. Certified guides included.

hero.title: Mount Rinjani 4-Day Senaru Trek — Summit, Lake & Hot Spring Through the Rainforest
hero.desc: Go2Rinjani's most complete Senaru package — the 4-day Senaru summit lake trek combines everything Mount Rinjani National Park has to offer: dense tropical rainforest, Pelawangan Senaru crater rim, the summit at 3,726 m, sacred Segara Anak lake, and volcanic hot springs. The ultimate Rinjani experience via Senaru's legendary western trail.

intro.label: 4 Days 3 Nights — Senaru Route
intro.title: The Ultimate Senaru Rinjani Trek — Summit, Lake & Rainforest in Four Days
intro.desc: The 4-day Senaru summit lake trek is the most complete Mount Rinjani experience available via the western Senaru route. Starting from the ancient Sasak village of Senaru, the trail climbs through dense tropical rainforest to Pelawangan Senaru crater rim (2,641 m) before pushing to the summit of Mount Rinjani at 3,726 m. The extra days allow for a relaxed summit push, extended time beside Segara Anak lake at 2,008 m, a soak in the volcanic hot springs, and deep immersion in the natural and cultural landscapes of Rinjani National Park. Go2Rinjani's certified local guides lead every step of the journey.

highlights.section_title: What to Expect on This Trek

items.title: Senaru Rainforest Trail
items.desc: The 4-day Senaru trek begins in the most biodiverse section of Mount Rinjani National Park — the dense tropical rainforest of the western Senaru route, rich with native flora, endemic birds, and the sounds of untouched mountain wilderness unique to this trail.

items.title: Pelawangan Senaru Crater Rim at 2,641 m
items.desc: Reach Pelawangan Senaru — the Senaru crater rim at 2,641 m — base camp for the summit push, with panoramic views over Segara Anak lake below and Mount Rinjani's summit rising to 3,726 m directly across the volcanic caldera.

items.title: Mount Rinjani Summit at 3,726 m
items.desc: The summit push via the Senaru route — a pre-dawn climb from Pelawangan Senaru to the summit of Mount Rinjani at 3,726 m, Lombok's highest peak and Indonesia's second-highest volcano, arriving for sunrise above the clouds with views across Lombok, Bali, and Sumbawa.

items.title: Segara Anak Lake at 2,008 m
items.desc: Descend into Mount Rinjani's sacred volcanic crater and camp beside Segara Anak lake at 2,008 m — a turquoise crater lake revered in both Sasak and Balinese tradition. The extra day of this package means genuine time to experience the lake, not just pass through it.

items.title: Volcanic Hot Springs
items.desc: Soak in the natural volcanic hot springs on the shores of Segara Anak lake — a deeply restorative experience after the summit push, and one of the most unforgettable highlights of the entire 4-day Senaru trek.

items.title: Deep Sasak Cultural Immersion
items.desc: The 4-day Senaru trek provides the most time to connect with the cultural landscapes of Mount Rinjani National Park — from the ancient Sasak village of Senaru at the trailhead to the sacred significance of Segara Anak lake in Sasak and Balinese spiritual tradition.

itinerary.intro: Four days, three nights on Rinjani's western Senaru route — rainforest, crater rim, summit at 3,726 m, Segara Anak lake, and volcanic hot springs.

days.title: Senaru Village to Pelawangan Senaru Crater Rim
days.desc: After breakfast and pre-trek briefing at your accommodation in Senaru, Go2Rinjani transfers you to the Senaru trailhead at the village edge. Trek through dense tropical rainforest and three rest posts before arriving at Pelawangan Senaru crater rim (2,641 m) by late afternoon. Dinner and overnight camping at the crater rim with panoramic views over Segara Anak lake and Rinjani's caldera.
highlights: Breakfast & pre-trek briefing in Senaru
Transfer to Senaru trailhead at village edge
Trek through dense tropical rainforest — Post 1, 2, 3
Arrive Pelawangan Senaru crater rim (2,641 m)
Panoramic views over Segara Anak lake & Rinjani caldera
Dinner & overnight camp at Pelawangan Senaru

days.title: Summit Push — Descent to Segara Anak Lake
days.desc: Pre-dawn departure from Pelawangan Senaru for the summit push to 3,726 m — arriving at the top of Mount Rinjani for sunrise above the clouds. After the summit, descend back to Pelawangan Senaru for breakfast, then continue the descent into the volcanic crater to Segara Anak lake (2,008 m). Camp beside the sacred crater lake for the first night at the lake.
highlights: Pre-dawn summit push from Pelawangan Senaru (2,641 m)
Arrive Mount Rinjani summit (3,726 m) at sunrise
Panoramic views over Lombok, Bali & Sumbawa
Descend to Pelawangan Senaru — breakfast at camp
Descent into volcanic crater to Segara Anak lake (2,008 m)
Dinner & first overnight camp beside Segara Anak lake

days.title: Full Day at Segara Anak Lake — Hot Springs & Crater Exploration
days.desc: A full day at the heart of Mount Rinjani National Park — beside Segara Anak lake on the volcanic crater floor. Soak in the natural hot springs, swim in the turquoise waters of the lake, explore the inner crater, and rest deeply after the summit push. Second overnight camp beside Segara Anak lake.
highlights: Sunrise over Segara Anak lake from lakeside camp
Volcanic hot spring soak at crater floor
Swimming in Segara Anak lake
Free exploration of the inner crater of Rinjani National Park
Lunch & rest at lakeside camp
Second overnight camp beside Segara Anak lake

days.title: Segara Anak Lake — Ascent & Descent to Senaru Village
days.desc: Final morning beside Segara Anak lake before beginning the ascent back to Pelawangan Senaru crater rim and the full descent through the rainforest to Senaru village. Transfer back to accommodation after completing the trek.
highlights: Final sunrise over Segara Anak lake
Breakfast at lakeside camp
Ascent from Segara Anak lake to Pelawangan Senaru (2,641 m)
Full descent through dense rainforest to Senaru village
Transfer back to accommodation

inclusions.intro: Every 4-day Mount Rinjani Senaru summit lake trek with Go2Rinjani is fully supported — here is exactly what is included.
included: Porter (personal camp equipment up to 25 kg)
Mount Rinjani National Park entrance permit
All meals on the mountain (3x daily) + hot drinks + mineral water
Full camping equipment: tent, sleeping bag, mattress, pillow, cooking gear
Hotel pickup and drop-off (Senaru, Mataram, Airport, Senggigi, Bangsal)
excluded: Personal trekking gear (jacket, trekking shoes, trekking poles, daypack)
Tips for guides and porters (appreciated but not mandatory)

details.label: Crater Rim Elevation
details.value: Pelawangan Senaru — 2,641 m above sea level

details.label: Best Season
details.value: April – December (dry season). Closed January – March.

details.label: Group Size
details.value: Minimum 2 — maximum 6 per group. Private groups available.
